summary: 2 film announcements, 1 TV announcement across 5 trades.

film.title: Princess Diaries 3
film.announcement: Anne Hathaway shares update on Princess Diaries 3 development, revealing the project had to 'start over' but has now achieved a 'story breakthrough' with the script moving in the right direction.

film.title: The End of Oak Street
film.announcement: New 4DX footage preview released featuring Anne Hathaway and Ewan McGregor in scenes involving dinosaurs.

tv.title: Man of Tomorrow
tv.announcement: James Gunn reveals that Big Brother 28 star Rick Devens was set for a cameo in Man of Tomorrow but had to cancel due to CBS competition conflicts.
